name_cn:
Authentic Grade
 [Top-tier Replica] M22399👏👏“Porto Claire” finished in two colors. A single-piece leather design symbolizing the manor reinterpreted with this season's matching colors, looks beautiful. This compact accessory features gold hardware, multiple pockets and compartments. Size: 11 x 8.5 x 3.5cm. 🎁🎁
